hooks.command: powershell -Command "$input = $env:CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT; if ($input -match '\"file_path\".*\.(ts|tsx)') { cd d:\Projects\alpaca-bot; npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 20 }"

powershell -Command "$input = $env:CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT; if ($input -match '\"file_path\".*\\.env[^.]') { Write-Error 'Blocked: direct edits to .env files are prohibited. Use .env.example instead.'; exit 1 }"
